servers.name: Minestom VRI
servers.description: A Minestom extension working toward full vanilla behavior reimplementation.

servers.name: Minestom Vibenilla
servers.description: Another Minestom-based server aiming for vanilla compliance.

servers.name: Pumpkin
servers.description: A Minecraft server built entirely in Rust, offering a fast, efficient, and customizable experience. It prioritizes performance and player enjoyment while adhering to the core mechanics of the game.

servers.name: Paper
servers.description: A widely-used Spigot fork that intentionally diverges from vanilla behavior for performance and gameplay improvements.
servers.forkNote: This is a fork of vanilla Minecraft. Forks are listed for completeness but are unlikely candidates for full compliance.

servers.name: FerrumC
servers.description: A 1.21.8 Minecraft server implementation written from the ground up in Rust. Leveraging the power of the Rust programming language, it is completely multithreaded and offers high performance as well as amazing memory efficiency.

servers.name: Obsidian
servers.description: A C# .NET implementation of the Minecraft server protocol.

servers.name: VectoraServer
servers.description: A high-performance custom Minecraft Java Edition 1.21.11 server written in modern C++20.

servers.name: Wrench
servers.description: A server focused on observability and control first, with compatibility planned as a later phase.
servers.forkNote: This is a fork of vanilla Minecraft. Forks are listed for completeness but are unlikely candidates for full compliance.
